race.comment: SOMETHIN IN ORANGE (1) ran a better race last start to finish a close second over 1600m at Eagle Farm after being in contention on the corner. The engagement of Nathan Fazackerley is noteworthy. Ideally placed in this contest and is sure to take plenty of stopping. MISTER MIGHTY (5) improved last time out, finishing a neck from the winner in third at the end of 1625m at this track. Nicely placed to play a pivotal role. BUMP'N'RUN (7) is a two-time winner around this circuit who will be ready to peak now third run back from the break. Top-three credentials on best figures. SWEET PRETENDER (6) finds it hard to win but ran a strong race last time when beaten a nose into second over 1625m at this circuit. May earn some minor money.
